title: hyptis maya
intro: Hyptis maya, also known as mayan tea or Mexican mint, is a perennial herb native to Central America and Mexico, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hyptis maya include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and fever, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. Hyptis maya is often prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or used in essential oil form, which can be inhaled or applied topically to the skin.
